Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-24 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker-long LINC dominates today's ranking at position 1 with an exceptional score of 95.6, driven by extraordinary long-term returns of 1,326% over 10 years and 505% over 5 years, while dramatically outperforming SPY by 1,104% and 441% respectively over those same periods. The stock passes 4 out of 5 momentum ratio thresholds, trades above all major moving averages, and shows a "strong_buy" signal with clean momentum and confirmed volatility characteristics. EFXT ranks second with a 183% 1-year return that crushes SPY by 168%, but its momentum structure weakens significantly at longer timeframes—10-year returns collapse to just 184% versus 206% over 5 years, and it underperforms SPY by 39% over a decade, signaling potential fatigue in the secular trend. The data reveals a stark divergence between exceptional near-to-medium term outperformers (both stocks) and truly durable multi-decade winners, with LINC's consistent acceleration across all timeframe ratios contrasting sharply against EFXT's deceleration pattern in the ratio_5y_1y and ratio_10y_5y metrics.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
